summary: Completed comprehensive testing of doodle wall recent changes including white background, no borders, black default color, 12px brush, and AI content moderation

minor_issues.issue: Content moderation is lenient - accepts text like 'VIOLENCE' which may be expected behavior for text-based content
minor_issues.impact: Low - moderation working for invalid data, may need tuning for edge cases

passed_tests: Doodle CRUD operations work (create, read, get by ID, delete)
Content moderation endpoint functional with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
Invalid image data properly rejected with validation errors
Wall background is pure white (no dot pattern)
Drawing modal opens with black as default color
Color palette starts with black instead of brown
Error messages display correctly for validation failures
Pan/zoom functionality works (zoom in, zoom out, reset view)
Color selection and switching works properly
Canvas drawing functionality works with thick brush strokes
